Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Andel]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — Andel is a person Calder mentions in relation to potentially shooting him.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Andel is the Quartermaster and Calder's oldest traveling companion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Andel drank wine.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 3''' — Andel drew a pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Andel is tired.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Andel wears a full white suit and hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Andel is a character who would be praying at this point in time.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Andel provides occasional input to Calder's navigation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — Andel is the Quartermaster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 11''' — Andel is a character who skewered a creature through the chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 12''' — Andel has a new sword that does not fit in its sheath.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 14''' — Andel wears a silver pendant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Andel is a character sitting in a rowboat with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Andel is a character who speaks quietly to Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — Andel is a person Calder thinks might be able to help.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Andel was invited onto a Navigator’s vessel to meet with Naberius' backers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — Andel is a crewmember whose suit was stained and hat was missing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Andel did not approve of Naberius being gagged and tied to the mast.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Andel is a member of the crew who shuffles cards to keep his hands occupied.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Andel is accompanying Calder Marten.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Andel believes the Elders would feed on the chaos of an empty throne.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — Calder tossed his hat to Andel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Andel is present in the hallway with Calder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — Andel warned Calder not to marry Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Andel is with Calder and Foster.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 25''' — Andel shot a bullet into the Child of Nakothi's belly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — Andel once carried Naberius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Andel joined Calder on the deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Andel is Calder's second-in-command.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Andel executed Naberius by shooting him in the forehead with a pistol.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Andel was not present on the deck of The Testament.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — Andel is Calder Marten's second-in-command and a Heartlander man wearing all white.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Andel emerged from below deck carrying wine and a basket of food.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — Andel is a member of Calder's crew who shouts orders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Andel has been plotting the ship's course for six weeks.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Andel is a man on the ship who was staring at fires.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — Andel refers to The Testament as his ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Andel led Calder through the palace hallways.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Andel did not panic upon reading the journal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — Andel reacted to the Elderspawn with a gunshot.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Andel is with Calder and Foster to test the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Andel wears the pure white of a Luminian Pilgrim and has a silver sun emblem on his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — Andel is part of Calder's crew.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Andel is someone who keeps a miserly grip on Calder's money.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Andel lit the fuse and launched an alchemical charge at a whale-sized shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Andel is present and speaks to the group.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 20''' — Andel is tasked with taking Calder ashore.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 21''' — Andel is a crew member on The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Andel wears a White Sun medallion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Andel is a former Pilgrim.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 23''' — Andel is an aide and supervisor to Calder Marten.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Petal believes Andel would know what to do regarding Jyrine's situation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 4''' — Andel spoke gently but relentlessly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Andel carries a pistol and a White Sun medallion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 10''' — Andel is sleeping in the main room.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 12''' — Andel was swallowed by a frog-like creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Andel was released from the mouth of an Elder creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — Andel is sitting with Jerri.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 15''' — Andel adjusted his hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 16''' — Andel was swallowed alive.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Andel is reciting a list.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Andel is a man who was hired to work on a noble family's estate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Andel possesses two medallions around his neck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Andel is a quartermaster and a former Pilgrim who was not a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Andel is not technically a Champion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Andel is a wanted fugitive of the Luminian Order.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Andel is in charge of driving citizens to a guarded checkpoint.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Andel addressed Calder as Your Imperial Highness.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 20''' — Andel's voice was shaky.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — Andel asked if Calder would recover.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 22''' — Andel is on the ramp of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Andel is on the deck of The Testament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Andel is a character who pointed out that Calder had moved to tears twice recently.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Andel was seated on the deck without his hat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Andel whispered 'Light and life'.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Andel projects white light from his outstretched hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Andel possesses a White Sun on his chest.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Andel is one of Calder's last crew members.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Andel is a character who showed little reaction to Petal's gasp.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 26''' — Andel watched Foster's story.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
